title: Craft Royale
description: A battle royale modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1
body:
### What's this pack about?
Craft Royale is a battle royale modpack based on TaCZ, featuring an automatic round system, random map selection, custom loot tables and more.

### How does it work?
All the custom functionality has been added through a datapack made specifically for Craft Royale from scratch. When 2 or more players join a server, it automatically teleports them to a random spot in the world and places a shrinking world border around them. From there, your goal is to acquire as much loot as possible and be the last man standing.

### Are there any official servers?
While there were official servers in the past, they've been down for a while. We might start them back up soon!

### I would like to suggest a feature/change, where do I do that?
We're always open to suggestions, feel free to open an issue on Github or our Discord server.

### How many mods are in the pack?
The pack has about 30 mods total. One of our main goals for the modpack was to keep it lightweight - which is why TaCZ is the only major content mod.

### Can I host my own server?
Yes! With every release we're providing a server pack for you to use for anything you'd like. You can also host a LAN game with just your client, everything's been configured already.

### Will there be more gamemodes?
Yes, more gamemodes are planned and will be added in the future.
